privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a sales quote in NCH Copper Point of Sale v3.06 for a customer named 'Greenfield Office Solutions' with three office supply items (Copy Paper A4 quantity 20, Ballpoint Pen Blue quantity 10, Manila Folder quantity 8). The customer name and all three items are not found in the environment's real datasets (customers.csv and products.csv), indicating this task uses synthetic data created specifically for this benchmark task. The Copper POS application stores data in C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper. Support for quote/estimate transaction types in Copper POS could not be independently verified from public documentation.
